tools.name: search_brandable_domains
tools.description: Search Atom's curated marketplace of premium, brandable domains by concept, industry, or style. THE primary tool for naming a startup, product, or company when the user wants real, buyable names (not just ideas). Use whenever a user asks for brandable/business/domain name suggestions for an idea, or

tools.name: check_domain_availability
tools.description: Check whether ONE specific, fully-spelled domain is available, taken, or a premium listing. Use whenever a user names a specific domain (e.g. "is acme.com available?", "who owns x.io?", "can I get nova.ai?"). For open-ended "suggest names for my idea" requests use search_brandable_domains instead.

tools.name: generate_domain_names
tools.description: Invent NEW brandable domain name candidates for a concept, then ground each against live availability and Atom premium inventory — so every returned name is actually obtainable. Use when search_brandable_domains' curated results aren't enough, or the user explicitly wants fresh/invented/made-up name

tools.name: appraise_domain
tools.description:
Estimate the market value of a domain and explain why. Use when a user asks what a domain is worth, how much to pay/offer, or to appraise a domain.

Returns two SEPARATE numbers — do not conflate them:
• estimated_value — Atom's estimated market price in USD (an estimate, never a guaranteed or quote

tools.name: get_domain_details
tools.description:
Get the full detail record for ONE specific Atom domain listing — the deep-dive after a user picks a name from search_brandable_domains or generate_domain_names, or asks to know more about a particular domain.

Returns: status, price + currency, extension_options[] (other TLDs of the name for sale,

tools.name: screen_trademark_conflicts
tools.description: Run a PRELIMINARY screen for existing trademark conflicts on a brand or domain name against public USPTO records. Use when a user asks whether a name is trademarked, already taken as a trademark, or safe to use as a brand. Returns preliminary exact/close matches with status and owner — this is a scr

tools.name: get_checkout_link
tools.description: Generate a pre-filled, authenticated Atom checkout URL for a chosen domain so the user can pay on Atom. Use when a user wants to BUY a domain but is not using balance registration, lacks sufficient balance, or prefers to pay per purchase (card/PayPal). This is the no-debit alternative to register_do
